title: cyperus oxylepis
intro: Cyperus oxylepis, also known as the 'Marsh Club-rush', is a type of aquatic plant belonging to the sedge family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Cyperus oxylepis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate joint pain, and promote digestive health. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
